updates.title: Income tax scrutiny: Who could get a tax notice by June 30 and how to respond?
updates.summary: Taxpayers should note that June 30 is the deadline for scrutiny notices under Section 143(2) for ITRs filed during FY 2025-26. Here are cases when you may receive a notice and what to do next.

updates.summary: Income-tax returns: The Income-Tax Department has introduced some key changes in how taxpayer report income using the ITR-4 / Sugam form online for this tax year (FY26 / AY27). Here's all you need to know…

updates.title: Using ChatGPT or Claude AI to file ITR? Experts warn it may not be as reliable as you think
updates.summary: As tax season begins, professionals are using AI tools like ChatGPT to simplify tax filing despite concerns over reliability. Experts warn that these tools struggle with complex tax situations and lack accuracy, leading to security risks and errors. Details here.
